annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Zone detection at cursor coordinates, adjacency navigation, zone enumeration, and keyboard modifier state.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Return the zone UUID at the given screen coordinates, or empty string if none.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Zone UUID at position, or empty string.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Return zone UUIDs at the given position (for multi-zone snap at overlapping boundaries).

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Return zone geometry as a struct (x, y, width, height) for the primary screen.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Zone geometry struct: (x, y, width, height).

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Return zone geometry as a struct for a specific screen.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Zone geometry struct: (x, y, width, height).

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Return all zone UUIDs on the given screen.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Return the adjacent zone in the given direction.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Adjacent zone UUID, or empty string.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Return the edge zone in the given direction. Used when a window is not yet snapped and the user presses a navigation key: returns the leftmost, rightmost, topmost, or bottommost zone.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Edge zone UUID, or empty string.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Return the zone UUID for a given zone number (1-indexed).

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Return all zone geometries as a list of named geometry structs, optionally for a specific screen.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: List of named zone geometry structs: (zoneId, x, y, width, height).

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Return the current keyboard modifier state as a Qt::KeyboardModifiers bitmask. Values: 0x02000000=Shift, 0x04000000=Control, 0x08000000=Alt, 0x10000000=Meta.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Modifier bitmask (0 if no modifiers pressed).

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Detect zone at position and return modifier state in a single D-Bus call. Returns zoneId;modifiers (e.g. uuid-here;33554432 for Shift). Empty zone ID if no zone found; modifiers still appended after semicolon.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Emitted when a zone is detected at a position.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Zone geometry struct: (x, y, width, height).
